title: Lying Cats
description: You can place lying cats anywhere you want!
body:
![banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50bdffa24440aac8e541df5075de3e79620aa6b6.png)

## Description
Lying Cats is a texture pack that renders a sleeping version of all Minecraft cat variants by renaming a string item on the anvil.

## Important notes
- This package does not require CIT Resewn or Optifine in 1.21.5 and above
- You need to place the renamed string into a item frame
- For aesthetic purposes, use MattyWaker's invisible item frame texture pack
- Command to get a renamed item in creative mode: /give @p string[custom_name='Example']
- Go to the gallery to see examples

## How it works
Rename a string item with the respective names:

<details>
<summary>ITEMS</summary>

- Lying All Black
- Lying Black
- Lying British Shorthair
- Lying Calico
- Lying Jellie
- Lying Ocelot
- Lying Persian
- Lying Ragdoll
- Lying Red
- Lying Siamese
- Lying Tabby
- Lying White

</details>
